title: Crispy Buttery Tunisian Chuck Roast Tagine
description: A low-glycemic friendly Tunisian dish featuring chuck roast in a crispy buttery crust, infused with aromatic oils and spices. This monsoon-inspired recipe is perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large Dutch oven, heat the infuse oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cubed chuck roast and cook until browned on all sides, stirring occasionally.
Add the cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the melted butter and stir to combine.
Cover the Dutch oven and transfer to the preheated oven.
Braise the tagine for 2 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender and the crust is crispy.
Stir in the chopped dried apricots and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
